sql_array: CREATE TABLE points (id UInt32, coordinates Tuple(Float64, Float64)) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT id, coordinates, distance(coordinates, (0.0, 0.0)) AS distance_from_origin FROM points;
UPDATE points SET coordinates = (15.0, 25.0) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, coordinates, distance(coordinates, (20.0, 30.0)) AS distance_to_point FROM points WHERE id = 2;
